envVars.name: AIONMARKET_API_KEY
envVars.description: Aionmarket agent API key used for authenticated reads and trade execution.

envVars.name: WALLET_ADDRESS
envVars.description: Polymarket wallet address used for credential verification, market context, and trade payloads.

envVars.name: POLYMARKET_API_KEY
envVars.description: Polymarket CLOB API key used when registering wallet credentials for live trading.

envVars.name: POLYMARKET_API_SECRET
envVars.description: Polymarket CLOB API secret used when registering wallet credentials for live trading.

envVars.name: POLYMARKET_API_PASSPHRASE
envVars.description: Polymarket CLOB API passphrase used when registering wallet credentials for live trading.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Optional EVM wallet private key for local EIP712 signing. Only needed when the user wants local signing instead of supplying a pre-signed order object.

envVars.name: AIONMARKET_BASE_URL
envVars.description: Optional Aionmarket API base URL override. Default documented base URL is https://pm-t1.bxingupdate.com/bvapi.
